Issues seeded into dirty.csv, line by line.

Line numbers count physical lines (LF-terminated), starting at 1 for the
header. Line endings are deliberately mixed: most rows end with \n, but
several (marked CRLF) end with \r\n. The file also begins with a UTF-8 BOM
(EF BB BF) that precedes the header on line 1.

File-level: UTF-8 BOM at start of file (before line 1).
File-level: mixed line endings (\r\n on lines 1, 3, 6, 9, 12, 15, 18, 21, 24, 27, 30, 33; \n elsewhere).

Line 1: header row "id,name,email,age,score,country,note" (CRLF). BOM is glued to the start of "id".
Line 2: clean baseline row, no issues.
Line 3: trailing whitespace on multiple cells (name "Bruno Costa  ", email "bruno.costa@example.com  ", note "returning user   ") (CRLF).
Line 4: leading whitespace on multiple cells (name "   Chiaki Saito", email "  chiaki.saito@example.com", country "  Japan", note "  top performer").
Line 5: empty row (zero-length line between records).
Line 6: null token "NA" in note column (CRLF).
Line 7: null token "N/A" in country column.
Line 8: null tokens "NULL" in country and "null" in note.
Line 9: null tokens "?" in country and "-" in note (CRLF).
Line 10: empty-string null tokens in score and note (consecutive commas).
Line 11: smart double quotes (U+201C / U+201D) wrapping the note value.
Line 12: smart single quotes (U+2018 / U+2019) wrapping the note value (CRLF).
Line 13: internal whitespace runs in name ("Kavita    Iyer") and note ("foo    bar    baz").
Line 14: numeric outlier in score (9999, far outside 0-100 range).
Line 15: numeric outlier in score (-500, negative and outside range) (CRLF).
Line 16: empty row.
Line 17: mixed-type value in score column (string "high" instead of number).
Line 18: mixed-type value in score column (string "n/a" instead of number) (CRLF).
Line 19: clean row, no issues.
Line 20: full duplicate of line 2 (Alice Johnson record repeated).
Line 21: clean row, no issues (CRLF).
Line 22: leading and trailing whitespace on every cell combined in one row.
Line 23: clean row, no issues.
Line 24: empty row (CRLF).
Line 25: full duplicate of line 21 (Quentin Lefevre record repeated).
Line 26: smart double quotes (U+201C / U+201D) embedded mid-cell in note ("ok" result).
Line 27: internal whitespace runs in name ("Uma   Sharma") and note ("hello    world") (CRLF).
Line 28: clean row, no issues.
Line 29: trailing whitespace on name cell ("Wendy Park   ").
Line 30: full duplicate of line 23 (Sofia Rossi record repeated) (CRLF).
Line 31: empty-string null token in country column.
Line 32: clean row, no issues.
Line 33: clean row, no issues (CRLF, final line).

Summary of cleaning operations this fixture exercises:
  - strip UTF-8 BOM
  - normalize line endings to a single style
  - drop empty rows (lines 5, 16, 24)
  - drop fully duplicate rows (line 20 dupes line 2; line 25 dupes line 21; line 30 dupes line 23)
  - trim leading and trailing whitespace from cells
  - collapse internal whitespace runs
  - canonicalize null tokens ("", "NA", "N/A", "null", "NULL", "-", "?") to a single null representation
  - detect mixed-type column (score has strings on lines 17, 18)
  - detect numeric outliers in score (9999 on line 14, -500 on line 15)
  - normalize smart quotes (U+201C/U+201D/U+2018/U+2019) to ASCII quotes
